title: Allow NGO accounts to count in app ratings
excerpt: Since NGO accounts aren’t paid monday accounts, they aren’t counted in app ratings. I have an NGO customer who has been paying for my app for a long time, but their app rating for some reason doesn’t count, since they’re…

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
Since NGO accounts aren’t paid monday accounts, they aren’t counted in app ratings. I have an NGO customer who has been paying for my app for a long time, but their app rating for some reason doesn’t count, since they’re not paying for their monday account. This seems surprising.

Could we include NGO accounts in app ratings?
